project_name: Retail Tailoring & Fabric Business Management Dashboard
archetype_reasoning: A tailoring shop deals with physical textiles, fabric, and craftsmen. A sterile tech dashboard feels foreign. Using warm sand, terracotta, and deep forest green creates a grounded, tactile, and trustworthy environment suitable for shop owners and karigars. The 'Control Room' density ensures high functionality.

typography.rules: Never use Inter. Headlines must be tightly tracked. Numbers in tables must use tabular-nums or monospace for alignment.

colors.rules: The UI must feel like premium stationery or linen. Use sharp 1px borders instead of drop shadows to define boundaries. No 'muddy' grays; all grays must have warm undertones.

layout_spacing.philosophy: The 'Control Room' Grid but with generous internal padding.
layout_spacing.dashboard_shell: Side navigation taking 15-20% width (hidden on mobile), main content 80-85%.
layout_spacing.cards: col-span-1 md:col-span-2 xl:col-span-3 for KPIs. col-span-12 or 8 for Data Tables.
layout_spacing.padding: Use generous padding inside bordered containers (p-6 or p-8). Keep gaps tight (gap-4 or gap-6) between containers.
layout_spacing.radius: rounded-sm (2px) or rounded-none to maintain a crisp, receipt/ledger-like structural feel.
layout_spacing.shadows: Avoid generic soft shadows. Use 1px sharp borders. For hover states, use an offset sharp shadow (e.g., 2px 2px 0px rgba(0,0,0,0.1)).

components.buttons: Flat solid background. Text color must have 4.5:1 contrast. On hover, darken background slightly and maintain text contrast. Do not use pills; stick to rounded-sm.
components.cards: Surface is pure white, 1px subtle border (#EBE8E1). No shadow. Inside padding p-6.
components.tables: Shadcn UI tables heavily customized. Remove rounded corners. Header background should be subtle sand (#F5F3EE) with uppercase tracking-[0.1em] text. Rows must have a bottom border. Row hover should be a very faint terracotta tint (e.g., #C86B4D at 5% opacity).
components.forms_inputs: Shadcn inputs. 1px border. On focus: ring-1 ring-terracotta (#C86B4D) and border-terracotta. No thick glowing rings.
components.status_badges: Minimal. Instead of solid background pills, use an uppercase label with a colored dot preceding it (e.g., 🔴 Pending, 🟢 Reconciled) or subtle 10% opacity backgrounds with 1px borders of the same color.
components.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Do not use the default segmented control look. Use 'underline' style or clean text links with a terracotta active state.

interactions_motion.hover_states: Buttons translate-y-[-1px] with a subtle sharp shadow. Table rows tint background.
interactions_motion.loading: Do not use spinning circles. Use a scanning line or skeleton loaders with a warm gradient.

icons_assets.icon_style: Duotone or Regular weight. Size 20px for general UI, 24px for sidebar.

logo.description: Minimalist needle and thread geometric logo in dark terracotta on warm sand. Use for branding, sidebar header, and login screen.

login_background.description: Abstract close-up of woven cotton fabric in bone white. Use as a split-screen background for the login page to add texture and physical grounding.

accessibility.contrast: All text must pass WCAG AA against its background. Terracotta and Forest Green must be dark enough to pass on white.
accessibility.testing: CRITICAL: Every button, link, form input, and key data cell MUST have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='create-bill-btn').

instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: You must install @phosphor-icons/react for the UI icons.
FILE EXTENSIONS: Ensure you use .js or .jsx for all React components (no .tsx). Modify shadcn generation if needed.
FONTS: Import 'Manrope' for headings and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text via Google Fonts in index.css. Do NOT use Inter.
ARCHITECTURE: This is a robust dashboard. Create a layout shell with a collapsible or fixed left sidebar and a top header. The main content area should scroll independently.

COMPONENT USAGE: Rely heavily on Shadcn UI (Tables, Dialogs, Select, Forms, Tabs) but override the default Vercel-like styling to match the organic, crisp aesthetic defined in the 'colors' and 'layout_spacing' sections.
DATA HEAVY VIEWS: For views like 'Daybook', 'Job Work Tracker', and 'Payment Settlement', use wide tables (col-span-full). Do not compress them into cards. Let them breathe horizontally.
NEW BILL ENTRY: This should be an immersive view or large modal. The layout needs clear sections: Customer Info (top), Items Grid (middle), Payment/Summary (bottom).
THE TWIST: Add an subtle ASCII art or delicate SVG pattern in the 'Empty States' to make the tool feel like an artisanal ledger rather than a standard SaaS.
